creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Piotr,

this is the same bug as https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=245200 and your patch corresponds to the change the upstream author did in response to https://github.com/ThKattanek/emu64/issues/191 -- so this looks fine.

I assume the emulator works with this patch applied?

Best regards, Felix
